supported_devices: Irrigation pumps, fans, LED lights, chillers, heaters, and any high-power (0-250VAC) or low-voltage (0-30VDC) dry-contact device
port_types: 4x dry contact relay channel (0-250VAC / 30VDC, 10A per channel, 40A combined), 24V DC power input
ai_notes: Platform-wide ML automation engine; AI Agronomist uses image recognition and NLP for plant health diagnosis, pest and disease detection (photo and voice input); weekly AI Climate Summary email reports. AI features require cloud connectivity. Free tier available for AI Agronomist per manufacturer.
compatible_ec_fans: any fan with dry-contact or relay input (on/off control only, no speed regulation)
compatible_lights: any light fixture with dry-contact switching (on/off, schedule only)
compatible_humidifiers: any humidifier with dry-contact or relay input
compatible_irrigation: any irrigation pump with dry-contact or relay input
compatible_co2_equipment: any CO2 device with dry-contact or relay input
recommended_use_note: Commercial greenhouse and grow room relay switching for high-power and low-voltage devices. On/off control only — not for fan speed or light dimming. Part of scalable GrowDirector 3 PRO modular ecosystem.
uvp_notes: Indicative price from AgriExpo marketplace, excl. tax. Official shop requires quote request. May not reflect current pricing.
notes: Part of GrowDirector 3 PRO modular ecosystem. Made in Israel. Relay rated 0-250VAC / 30VDC at 10A per channel, 40A total across all 4 channels. Up to 64,000 devices networkable in series. System maintains local automation when internet unavailable; full remote access requires internet. Not sold on Amazon.de.
